title: epidendrum tigriphyllum
intro: Epidendrum tigriphyllum, also known as the tiger orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Epidendrum tigriphyllum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using it as a tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
